metadata.description: The complete Claude Code toolkit for SaaS founders - from idea to launch.

plugins.name: saas-toolkit
plugins.description: Full-stack SaaS development and launch toolkit with 15 skills and a SaaS mentor agent. Covers Next.js, Supabase Auth, Vercel, PostHog, Polar.sh billing, Vercel AI SDK, SEO, landing pages, and launch readiness.
